'''鈭歝h-z-ng''' ('''kachazang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythify|mythify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythify|mythify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-z-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kachazang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazang|thichazang]] || [[word:jichazang|jichazang]] || [[word:shichazang|shichazang]] || [[word:kichazang|kichazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazang|thuthuchazang]] || [[word:jujuchazang|jujuchazang]] || [[word:shushuchazang|shushuchazang]] || [[word:kukuchazang|kukuchazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazang|thuchazang]] || [[word:juchazang|juchazang]] || [[word:shuchazang|shuchazang]] || [[word:kuchazang|kuchazang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazang|thuchazang]] || [[word:juchazang|juchazang]] || [[word:shuchazang|shuchazang]] || [[word:kuchazang|kuchazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazang|thechazang]] || [[word:jechazang|jechazang]] || [[word:shechazang|shechazang]] || [[word:kechazang|kechazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazang|thothochazang]] || [[word:jojochazang|jojochazang]] || [[word:shoshochazang|shoshochazang]] || [[word:kokochazang|kokochazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazang|thochazang]] || [[word:jochazang|jochazang]] || [[word:shochazang|shochazang]] || [[word:kochazang|kochazang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazang|thochazang]] || [[word:jochazang|jochazang]] || [[word:shochazang|shochazang]] || [[word:kochazang|kochazang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]] || [[word:chazang|chazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chazang|th忙chazang]] || [[word:j忙chazang|j忙chazang]] || [[word:sh忙chazang|sh忙chazang]] || [[word:k忙chazang|k忙chazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazang|thathachazang]] || [[word:jajachazang|jajachazang]] || [[word:shashachazang|shashachazang]] || [[word:kakachazang|kakachazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazang|thachazang]] || [[word:jachazang|jachazang]] || [[word:shachazang|shachazang]] || [[word:kachazang|kachazang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazang|thachazang]] || [[word:jachazang|jachazang]] || [[word:shachazang|shachazang]] || [[word:kachazang|kachazang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazang|shachazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazang|goshachazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazang|gokishachazang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazangn眉|shachazangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazangnkn眉|goshachazangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazangn眉|gokishachazangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazangsh毛|shachazangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazangnksh毛|goshachazangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazangsh毛|gokishachazangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazangro|shachazangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazangnkro|goshachazangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazangro|gokishachazangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazangmu|shachazangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazangnkmu|goshachazangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazangmu|gokishachazangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazangsher|shachazangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazangnksher|goshachazangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazangsher|gokishachazangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazangng|shachazangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazangnkng|goshachazangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazangng|gokishachazangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazangya|shachazangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazangnkya|goshachazangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazangya|gokishachazangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazangyam|shachazangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazangnkyam|goshachazangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazangyam|gokishachazangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazangn眉sh毛|shachazangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazangnkn眉sh毛|goshachazangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazangn眉sh毛|gokishachazangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazangn眉ro|shachazangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazangnkn眉ro|goshachazangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazangn眉ro|gokishachazangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazangn眉mu|shachazangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazangnkn眉mu|goshachazangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazangn眉mu|gokishachazangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazangsh毛n眉|shachazangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazangnksh毛n眉|goshachazangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazangsh毛n眉|gokishachazangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazangsh毛ro|shachazangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazangnksh毛ro|goshachazangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazangsh毛ro|gokishachazangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazangsh毛mu|shachazangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazangnksh毛mu|goshachazangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazangsh毛mu|gokishachazangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazangron眉|shachazangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazangnkron眉|goshachazangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazangron眉|gokishachazangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazangrosh毛|shachazangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazangnkrosh毛|goshachazangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazangrosh毛|gokishachazangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazangromu|shachazangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazangnkromu|goshachazangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazangromu|gokishachazangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazangmun眉|shachazangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazangnkmun眉|goshachazangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazangmun眉|gokishachazangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazangmush毛|shachazangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazangnkmush毛|goshachazangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazangmush毛|gokishachazangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazangmuro|shachazangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazangnkmuro|goshachazangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazangmuro|gokishachazangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
